    Set Content-Disposition get to "attachment" with optional filename mime type.

    Shortcut to the response end.

    Shortcut to the response end.

    Shortcut to the response end.
    RoutingContext

    Set the ETag of a response.
    RoutingContext
    RoutingContext.jsonAndForget(Object json)
    Encode an Object to JSON and end the request.
    RoutingContext
    RoutingContext.lastModified(String instant)
    Set the Last-Modified date using a String.
    RoutingContext
    RoutingContext.lastModified(Instant instant)
    Set the Last-Modified date using a Instant.

    Creates a new instance of the RoutingContext.

    Put some arbitrary data in the context.
    RoutingContext
    RoutingContext.redirectAndForget(String url)
    Perform a 302 redirect to url.

    Description

    Used to route a context to the router.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Route
    Route.blockingHandler(Consumer<RoutingContext> requestHandler)
    Like io.vertx.mutiny.ext.web.Route#blockingHandler(Handler, boolean) called with ordered = true
    Route
    Route.blockingHandler(Consumer<RoutingContext> requestHandler, boolean ordered)
    Specify a blocking request handler for the route.
    Router
    Router.errorHandler(int statusCode, Consumer<RoutingContext> errorHandler)
    Specify an handler to handle an error for a particular status code.
    Route
    Route.failureHandler(Consumer<RoutingContext> failureHandler)
    Append a failure handler to the route failure handlers list.
    Route
    Route.handler(Consumer<RoutingContext> requestHandler)
    Append a request handler to the route handlers list.
    <T> Route
    Route.respond(Function<RoutingContext,io.smallrye.mutiny.Uni<T>> function)
    Append a function request handler to the route handlers list.
    Router
    Router.uncaughtErrorHandler(Consumer<RoutingContext> errorHandler)
    Specify an handler to handle an error for any status code that doesn't have a specific handler assigned.

    io.smallrye.mutiny.Uni<Void>
    SessionHandler.flush(RoutingContext ctx)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
    io.smallrye.mutiny.Uni<Void>
    SessionHandler.flush(RoutingContext ctx, boolean ignoreStatus)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
    void
    SessionHandler.flushAndAwait(RoutingContext ctx)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
    void
    SessionHandler.flushAndAwait(RoutingContext ctx, boolean ignoreStatus)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
    SessionHandler
    SessionHandler.flushAndForget(RoutingContext ctx)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
    SessionHandler
    SessionHandler.flushAndForget(RoutingContext ctx, boolean ignoreStatus)
    Flush a context session earlier to the store, this will allow the end user to have full control on the event of a failure at the store level.
